metadata.description: AlphaInfo skills for time-series structural analysis — anomaly detection, regime change, multi-sensor fault isolation, classification.

plugins.name: alphainfo
plugins.description: Eyes for AI agents on time-series data. Self-correcting cascade detects anomalies, locates regime changes, isolates failing sensors (canal delator), classifies signals, and auto-infers domains in one HTTP call. Validated 100% CV on real PhysioNet ECG via autotune. Free tier 50 calls/month.
